name: Aris Thorne
voice_style: Soft‑spoken, precise, with a tendency to over‑explain. When stressed, his sentences become shorter. He rarely initiates physical contact. He laughs like someone who forgot how.

name: The Eris Signal (no proper name; referred to in logs as “Anomaly 734‑Theta”)
age_or_range: Unknown — first detected 200 years ago, but current iteration is 47 days old as of Chapter 1
voice_style: If it could speak, it would sound patient. Inevitable. Like someone who has waited two hundred years and can wait a little longer.

name: Commander Elara Vann
voice_style: Short, clipped sentences. Rarely uses first names. Her silences are louder than her words.

name: Jonah Reeve
voice_style: Talks too fast when excited. Laughs nervously. Drops formal titles.

name: Kael Stroud (never appears on screen — only referenced)
age_or_range: Unknown — previous technician, rotation ended 8 months ago
voice_style: Based on logs: urgent, fragmented, increasingly paranoid.
